SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.LimiterHomotopy
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining use of homotopy in limiter components

Item.name: NoHomotopy
Item.description: Homotopy is not used

Item.name: Linear
Item.description: Simplified model without limits

Item.name: UpperLimit
Item.description: Simplified model fixed at upper limit

Item.name: LowerLimit
Item.description: Simplified model fixed at lower limit

Item.name: Constant
Item.description: Use parameter to set stage

Item.name: Stages
Item.description: Use integer input to select stage

Item.name: Continuous
Item.description: Use continuous, real input

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.Init
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining initialization of a block

Item.name: NoInit
Item.description: No initialization (start values are used as guess values with fixed=false)

Item.name: SteadyState
Item.description: Steady state initialization (derivatives of states are zero)

Item.name: InitialState
Item.description: Initialization with initial states

Item.name: InitialOutput
Item.description: Initialization with initial outputs (and steady state of the states if possible)

SimpleType.name: Buildings.Fluid.Movers.BaseClasses.Types.PrescribedVariable
SimpleType.description: Enumeration to choose what variable is prescribed

Item.name: Speed
Item.description: Speed is prescribed

Item.name: FlowRate
Item.description: Flow rate is prescribed

Item.name: PressureDifference
Item.description: Pressure difference is prescribed

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Utilities.Types.Compare
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining comparison of two strings

Item.name: Less
Item.description: String 1 is lexicographically less than string 2

Item.name: Equal
Item.description: String 1 is identical to string 2

Item.name: Greater
Item.description: String 1 is lexicographically greater than string 2

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Fluid.Types.Dynamics
SimpleType.description: Enumeration to define definition of balance equations

Item.name: DynamicFreeInitial
Item.description: DynamicFreeInitial -- Dynamic balance, Initial guess value

Item.name: FixedInitial
Item.description: FixedInitial -- Dynamic balance, Initial value fixed

Item.name: SteadyStateInitial
Item.description: SteadyStateInitial -- Dynamic balance, Steady state initial with guess value

Item.name: SteadyState
Item.description: SteadyState -- Steady state balance, Initial guess value

Item.name: never
Item.description: Do not use as state at all.

Item.name: avoid
Item.description: Use as state, if it cannot be avoided (but only if variable appears differentiated and no other potential state with attribute default, prefer, or always can be selected).

Item.name: default
Item.description: Use as state if appropriate, but only if variable appears differentiated.

Item.name: prefer
Item.description: Prefer it as state over those having the default value (also variables can be selected, which do not appear differentiated).

Item.name: always
Item.description: Do use it as a state.

SimpleType.name: Buildings.Fluid.Types.CvTypes
SimpleType.description: Enumeration to define the choice of valve flow coefficient

Item.name: OpPoint
Item.description: flow coefficient defined by m_flow_nominal/sqrt(dp_nominal)

Item.name: Kv
Item.description: Kv (metric) flow coefficient

Item.name: Cv
Item.description: Cv (US) flow coefficient

Item.name: Av
Item.description: Av (metric) flow coefficient

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.Smoothness
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining the smoothness of table interpolation

Item.name: LinearSegments
Item.description: Table points are linearly interpolated

Item.name: ContinuousDerivative
Item.description: Table points are interpolated (by Akima splines) such that the first derivative is continuous

Item.name: ConstantSegments
Item.description: Table points are not interpolated, but the value from the previous abscissa point is returned

Item.name: MonotoneContinuousDerivative1
Item.description: Table points are interpolated (by Fritsch-Butland splines) such that the monotonicity is preserved and the first derivative is continuous

Item.name: MonotoneContinuousDerivative2
Item.description: Table points are interpolated (by Steffen splines) such that the monotonicity is preserved and the first derivative is continuous

SimpleType.name: Modelica.Blocks.Types.Extrapolation
SimpleType.description: Enumeration defining the extrapolation of table interpolation

Item.name: HoldLastPoint
Item.description: Hold the first/last table point outside of the table scope

Item.name: LastTwoPoints
Item.description: Extrapolate by using the derivative at the first/last table points outside of the table scope

Item.name: Periodic
Item.description: Repeat the table scope periodically

Item.name: NoExtrapolation
Item.description: Extrapolation triggers an error

Item.name: File
Item.description: Use data from file

Item.name: Parameter
Item.description: Use parameter

Item.name: Input
Item.description: Use input connector

SimpleType.name: Buildings.BoundaryConditions.Types.RadiationDataSource
SimpleType.description: Enumeration to define solar radiation data source

Item.name: File
Item.description: Use data from file

Item.name: Input_HGloHor_HDifHor
Item.description: Global horizontal and diffuse horizontal radiation from connector

Item.name: Input_HDirNor_HDifHor
Item.description: Direct normal and diffuse horizontal radiation from connector

Item.name: Input_HDirNor_HGloHor
Item.description: Direct normal and global horizontal radiation from connector

SimpleType.name: Buildings.BoundaryConditions.Types.SkyTemperatureCalculation
SimpleType.description: Enumeration for computation of sky temperature

Item.name: HorizontalRadiation
Item.description: Use horizontal irradiation

Item.name: TemperaturesAndSkyCover
Item.description: Use dry-bulb and dew-point temperatures and sky cover

ScalarVariable.name: COPc_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Chiller COP

ScalarVariable.name: EHVAC.initType
ScalarVariable.description: Type of initialization (1: no init, 2: steady state, 3,4: initial output)

ScalarVariable.name: EHVAC.k
ScalarVariable.description: Integrator gain

ScalarVariable.name: EHVAC.u
ScalarVariable.description: Connector of Real input signal

ScalarVariable.name: EHVAC.use_reset
ScalarVariable.description: =true, if reset port enabled

ScalarVariable.description: =true, if set port enabled and used as reinitialization value when reset

ScalarVariable.name: EHVAC.y
ScalarVariable.description: Connector of Real output signal

ScalarVariable.name: EHVAC.y_start
ScalarVariable.description: Initial or guess value of output (= state)

ScalarVariable.name: EIT.initType
ScalarVariable.description: Type of initialization (1: no init, 2: steady state, 3,4: initial output)

ScalarVariable.name: EIT.k
ScalarVariable.description: Integrator gain

ScalarVariable.name: EIT.u
ScalarVariable.description: Connector of Real input signal

ScalarVariable.name: EIT.use_reset
ScalarVariable.description: =true, if reset port enabled

ScalarVariable.name: EIT.use_set
ScalarVariable.description: =true, if set port enabled and used as reinitialization value when reset

ScalarVariable.name: EIT.y
ScalarVariable.description: Connector of Real output signal

ScalarVariable.name: EIT.y_start
ScalarVariable.description: Initial or guess value of output (= state)

ScalarVariable.name: KMinusU.k
ScalarVariable.description: Sum of u and y

ScalarVariable.name: PHVAC.y
ScalarVariable.description: Value of Real output

ScalarVariable.name: PIT.y
ScalarVariable.description: Value of Real output

ScalarVariable.name: P_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal compressor power (at y=1)

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSet.k
ScalarVariable.description: Constant output value

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSet.y
ScalarVariable.description: Connector of Real output signal

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.T
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature of the passing fluid

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.TAmb
ScalarVariable.description: Fixed ambient temperature for heat transfer

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.T_start
ScalarVariable.description: Initial or guess value of output (= state)

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.initType
ScalarVariable.description: Type of initialization (InitialState and InitialOutput are identical)

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate, used for regularization near zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: For bi-directional flow, temperature is regularized in the region |m_flow| < m_flow_small (m_flow_small > 0 required)

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.port_a.Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.port_a.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.port_a.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.port_a.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.port_b.Xi_outflow[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Independent mixture mass fractions m_i/m close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.port_b.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.port_b.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.port_b.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.tau
ScalarVariable.description: Time constant at nominal flow rate (use tau=0 for steady-state sensor, but see user guide for potential problems)

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.tauHeaTra
ScalarVariable.description: Time constant for heat transfer, default 20 minutes

ScalarVariable.name: TAirSup.transferHeat
ScalarVariable.description: if true, temperature T converges towards TAmb when no flow

ScalarVariable.description: Condenser heat input

ScalarVariable.description: Evaporator heat input

ScalarVariable.description: Start value of temperature

ScalarVariable.name: chi.T2_start
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of temperature

ScalarVariable.description: Condenser leaving temperature

ScalarVariable.description: Start value of mass fractions m_i/m

ScalarVariable.name: chi.X2_start[1]
ScalarVariable.description: Start value of mass fractions m_i/m

ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal for medium 1

ScalarVariable.name: chi.allowFlowReversal2
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal for medium 2

ScalarVariable.name: chi.capFunT
ScalarVariable.description: Cooling capacity factor function of temperature curve

ScalarVariable.name: chi.computeFlowResistance1
ScalarVariable.description: =true, compute flow resistance. Set to false to assume no friction

ScalarVariable.name: chi.computeFlowResistance2
ScalarVariable.description: =true, compute flow resistance. Set to false to assume no friction

ScalarVariable.name: chi.deltaM1
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal flow rate where flow transitions to laminar

ScalarVariable.name: chi.deltaM2
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal flow rate where flow transitions to laminar

ScalarVariable.name: chi.dp1
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a1 and port_b1

ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference

ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference

ScalarVariable.name: chi.energyDynamics
ScalarVariable.description: Type of energy balance: dynamic (3 initialization options) or steady state

ScalarVariable.name: chi.from_dp1
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: chi.from_dp2
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: chi.homotopyInitialization
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use homotopy method

ScalarVariable.name: chi.linearizeFlowResistance1
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: chi.linearizeFlowResistance2
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a1 to port_b1 (m1_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.name: chi.preDro1.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal mass flow rate where transition to turbulent occurs

ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a and port_b

ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop at nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: chi.preDro1.from_dp
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: chi.preDro1.homotopyInitialization
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use homotopy method

ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2)

ScalarVariable.name: chi.preDro1.linearized
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: chi.preDro1.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.description: Turbulent flow if |m_flow| >= m_flow_turbulent

ScalarVariable.name: chi.preDro1.show_T

ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: chi.preDro2.deltaM

ScalarVariable.name: chi.preDro2.dp

ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: chi.preDro2.homotopyInitialization
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use homotopy method

ScalarVariable.name: chi.preDro2.k
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2)

ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: val1.Av
ScalarVariable.description: Av (metric) flow coefficient

ScalarVariable.name: val1.Cv
ScalarVariable.description: Cv (US) flow coefficient [USG/min/(psi)^(1/2)]

ScalarVariable.name: val1.CvData
ScalarVariable.description: Selection of flow coefficient

ScalarVariable.name: val1.Kv
ScalarVariable.description: Kv (metric) flow coefficient [m3/h/(bar)^(1/2)]

ScalarVariable.name: val1.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: val1.deltaM
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal flow rate where linearization starts, if y=1

ScalarVariable.name: val1.dp
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a and port_b

ScalarVariable.name: val1.dpFixed_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop of pipe and other resistances that are in series

ScalarVariable.name: val1.dpValve_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal pressure drop of fully open valve, used if CvData=Buildings.Fluid.Types.CvTypes.OpPoint

ScalarVariable.name: val1.dp_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop at nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: val1.from_dp
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: val1.homotopyInitialization
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use homotopy method

ScalarVariable.name: val1.init
ScalarVariable.description: Type of initialization (no init/steady state/initial state/initial output)

ScalarVariable.name: val1.k
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of valve and pipe in series, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: val1.kFixed
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of fixed resistance that may be in series with valve, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: val1.kVal
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of valve, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: val1.l
ScalarVariable.description: Valve leakage, l=Kv(y=0)/Kv(y=1)

ScalarVariable.name: val1.linearized
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: val1.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a to port_b (m_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.name: val1.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: val1.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: val1.m_flow_turbulent
ScalarVariable.description: Turbulent flow if |m_flow| >= m_flow_turbulent

ScalarVariable.name: val1.order
ScalarVariable.description: Order of filter

ScalarVariable.name: val1.phi
ScalarVariable.description: Ratio actual to nominal mass flow rate of valve, phi=Kv(y)/Kv(y=1)

ScalarVariable.name: val1.port_a.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: val1.port_a.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: val1.port_a.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: val1.port_b.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: val1.port_b.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: val1.port_b.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: val1.rhoStd
ScalarVariable.description: Inlet density for which valve coefficients are defined

ScalarVariable.name: val1.riseTime
ScalarVariable.description: Rise time of the filter (time to reach 99.6 % of an opening step)

ScalarVariable.name: val1.show_T
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if actual temperature at port is computed

ScalarVariable.name: val1.use_inputFilter
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if opening is filtered with a 2nd order CriticalDamping filter

ScalarVariable.name: val1.y
ScalarVariable.description: Actuator position (0: closed, 1: open)

ScalarVariable.name: val1.y_actual
ScalarVariable.description: Actual actuator position

ScalarVariable.name: val1.y_start
ScalarVariable.description: Initial value of output

ScalarVariable.name: val3.Av
ScalarVariable.description: Av (metric) flow coefficient

ScalarVariable.name: val3.Cv
ScalarVariable.description: Cv (US) flow coefficient [USG/min/(psi)^(1/2)]

ScalarVariable.name: val3.CvData
ScalarVariable.description: Selection of flow coefficient

ScalarVariable.name: val3.Kv
ScalarVariable.description: Kv (metric) flow coefficient [m3/h/(bar)^(1/2)]

ScalarVariable.name: val3.allowFlowReversal
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal

ScalarVariable.name: val3.deltaM
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal flow rate where linearization starts, if y=1

ScalarVariable.name: val3.dp
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a and port_b

ScalarVariable.name: val3.dpFixed_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop of pipe and other resistances that are in series

ScalarVariable.name: val3.dpValve_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal pressure drop of fully open valve, used if CvData=Buildings.Fluid.Types.CvTypes.OpPoint

ScalarVariable.name: val3.dp_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure drop at nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: val3.from_dp
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: val3.homotopyInitialization
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use homotopy method

ScalarVariable.name: val3.init
ScalarVariable.description: Type of initialization (no init/steady state/initial state/initial output)

ScalarVariable.name: val3.k
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of valve and pipe in series, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: val3.kFixed
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of fixed resistance that may be in series with valve, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: val3.kVal
ScalarVariable.description: Flow coefficient of valve, k=m_flow/sqrt(dp), with unit=(kg.m)^(1/2).

ScalarVariable.name: val3.l
ScalarVariable.description: Valve leakage, l=Kv(y=0)/Kv(y=1)

ScalarVariable.name: val3.linearized
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: val3.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a to port_b (m_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.name: val3.m_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: val3.m_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: val3.m_flow_turbulent
ScalarVariable.description: Turbulent flow if |m_flow| >= m_flow_turbulent

ScalarVariable.name: val3.order
ScalarVariable.description: Order of filter

ScalarVariable.name: val3.phi
ScalarVariable.description: Ratio actual to nominal mass flow rate of valve, phi=Kv(y)/Kv(y=1)

ScalarVariable.name: wse.C1_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat capacity flow rate medium 1

ScalarVariable.name: wse.C2_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat capacity flow rate medium 2

ScalarVariable.name: wse.CMin_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Minimum heat capacity flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: wse.Q1_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat transferred into the medium 1

ScalarVariable.name: wse.Q2_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Heat transferred into the medium 2

ScalarVariable.name: wse.QMax_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Maximum heat flow rate into medium 1

ScalarVariable.name: wse.T_in1
ScalarVariable.description: Inlet temperature medium 1

ScalarVariable.name: wse.T_in2
ScalarVariable.description: Inlet temperature medium 2

ScalarVariable.name: wse.allowFlowReversal1
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal for medium 1

ScalarVariable.name: wse.allowFlowReversal2
ScalarVariable.description: = false to simplify equations, assuming, but not enforcing, no flow reversal for medium 2

ScalarVariable.name: wse.computeFlowResistance1
ScalarVariable.description: =true, compute flow resistance. Set to false to assume no friction

ScalarVariable.name: wse.computeFlowResistance2
ScalarVariable.description: =true, compute flow resistance. Set to false to assume no friction

ScalarVariable.name: wse.deltaM1
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal flow rate where flow transitions to laminar

ScalarVariable.name: wse.deltaM2
ScalarVariable.description: Fraction of nominal flow rate where flow transitions to laminar

ScalarVariable.name: wse.dp1
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a1 and port_b1

ScalarVariable.name: wse.dp1_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference

ScalarVariable.name: wse.dp2
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference between port_a2 and port_b2

ScalarVariable.name: wse.dp2_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Pressure difference

ScalarVariable.name: wse.eps
ScalarVariable.description: Heat exchanger effectiveness

ScalarVariable.name: wse.from_dp1
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: wse.from_dp2
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use m_flow = f(dp) else dp = f(m_flow)

ScalarVariable.name: wse.homotopyInitialization
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use homotopy method

ScalarVariable.name: wse.linearizeFlowResistance1
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: wse.linearizeFlowResistance2
ScalarVariable.description: = true, use linear relation between m_flow and dp for any flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: wse.m1_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a1 to port_b1 (m1_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.name: wse.m1_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: wse.m1_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: wse.m2_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from port_a2 to port_b2 (m2_flow > 0 is design flow direction)

ScalarVariable.name: wse.m2_flow_nominal
ScalarVariable.description: Nominal mass flow rate

ScalarVariable.name: wse.m2_flow_small
ScalarVariable.description: Small mass flow rate for regularization of zero flow

ScalarVariable.name: wse.mWat1_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Moisture mass flow rate added to the medium 1

ScalarVariable.name: wse.mWat2_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Moisture mass flow rate added to the medium 2

ScalarVariable.name: wse.port_a1.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: wse.port_a1.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: wse.port_a1.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: wse.port_a2.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: wse.port_a2.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: wse.port_a2.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: wse.port_b1.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: wse.port_b1.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: wse.port_b1.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: wse.port_b2.h_outflow
ScalarVariable.description: Specific thermodynamic enthalpy close to the connection point if m_flow < 0

ScalarVariable.name: wse.port_b2.m_flow
ScalarVariable.description: Mass flow rate from the connection point into the component

ScalarVariable.name: wse.port_b2.p
ScalarVariable.description: Thermodynamic pressure in the connection point

ScalarVariable.name: wse.prescribedHeatFlowRate1
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true if the heat flow rate into fluid 1 is not a function of the component temperature

ScalarVariable.name: wse.prescribedHeatFlowRate2
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true if the heat flow rate into fluid 2 is not a function of the component temperature

ScalarVariable.name: wse.sensibleOnly1
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true if sensible exchange only for medium 1

ScalarVariable.name: wse.sensibleOnly2
ScalarVariable.description: Set to true if sensible exchange only for medium 2

ScalarVariable.name: wse.show_T
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if actual temperature at port is computed

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T1.condition
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if transition may fire (time varying expression)

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T1.enableFire
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if all firing conditions are true

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T1.enableTimer
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if timer is enabled

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T1.fire
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if transition fires

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T1.inPort.available
ScalarVariable.description: true, if step connected to the transition input is active

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T1.inPort.reset
ScalarVariable.description: true, if transition fires and the step connected to the transition input is deactivated

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T1.localCondition
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if transition may fire

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T1.outPort.occupied
ScalarVariable.description: true, if step connected to the transition output is active

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T1.outPort.set
ScalarVariable.description: true, if transition fires and step connected to the transition output becomes active

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T1.t
ScalarVariable.description: = actual waiting time (transition will fire when t > waitTime)

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T1.waitTime
ScalarVariable.description: Wait time before transition fires

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T2.condition
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if transition may fire (time varying expression)

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T2.enableFire
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if all firing conditions are true

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T2.enableTimer
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if timer is enabled

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T2.fire
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if transition fires

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T2.inPort.available
ScalarVariable.description: true, if step connected to the transition input is active

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T2.inPort.reset
ScalarVariable.description: true, if transition fires and the step connected to the transition input is deactivated

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T2.localCondition
ScalarVariable.description: = true, if transition may fire

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T2.outPort.occupied
ScalarVariable.description: true, if step connected to the transition output is active

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T2.outPort.set
ScalarVariable.description: true, if transition fires and step connected to the transition output becomes active

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T2.t
ScalarVariable.description: = actual waiting time (transition will fire when t > waitTime)

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.T2.waitTime
ScalarVariable.description: Wait time before transition fires

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.TWetBul
ScalarVariable.description: Wet bulb temperature

ScalarVariable.description: Output signal for false Boolean input

ScalarVariable.description: Output signal for true Boolean input

ScalarVariable.description: Temperature difference to switch WSE off

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.dTW
ScalarVariable.description: Temperature difference that is added to WSE on guard

ScalarVariable.description: true, if step is active

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.off.inPort[1].set
ScalarVariable.description: true, if transition fires and step is activated

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.off.localActive
ScalarVariable.description: = true if step is active, otherwise the step is not active

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.off.nIn
ScalarVariable.description: Number of input connections

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.off.nOut
ScalarVariable.description: Number of output connections

ScalarVariable.description: true, if step is active

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.off.outPort[1].reset
ScalarVariable.description: true, if transition fires and step is deactivated

ScalarVariable.description: = true if step is active, otherwise the step is not active

ScalarVariable.description: true, if step is active

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.on.inPort[1].set
ScalarVariable.description: true, if transition fires and step is activated

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.on.localActive
ScalarVariable.description: = true if step is active, otherwise the step is not active

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.on.nIn
ScalarVariable.description: Number of input connections

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.on.nOut
ScalarVariable.description: Number of output connections

ScalarVariable.description: true, if step is active

ScalarVariable.name: wseCon.on.outPort[1].reset
ScalarVariable.description: true, if transition fires and step is deactivated

ScalarVariable.description: Number of active steps within the stategraph

ScalarVariable.description: Number of active steps in the CompositeStep

ScalarVariable.description: Dummy variable in order that connector fulfills restriction of connector

ScalarVariable.description: WSE condenser water supply temperature (water entering WSE)
